notes: Keyboard: with the Windows touch-keyboard setting on 'Never' (stops it opening unprompted), the app now shows the keyboard itself on a text-field tap via the ITipInvocation API - which works with auto-show off - and hides it on navigation. Set Windows > Time & language > Typing > Touch keyboard to 'Never' on each tablet.
contentNotes: Test run of the one-command publish script.
